name: Din Sabic
intro: Ich entwickle moderne, performante Webanwendungen mit Fokus auf React, Next.js und TypeScript.
about: Frontend-Developer mit strukturierter Herangehensweise an technisch komplexe Aufgaben. Mein Fokus liegt auf sauberem, wartbarem Code, guter UX und kollaborativer Teamarbeit. Ich arbeite gerne eng mit Stakeholdern zusammen und setze Anforderungen praxisnah um.

projects.title: LeanIX Reporting Application
projects.description: Internal reporting solution built for enterprise architecture data visualization and analysis.
projects.role: Frontend / application developer during my IMS internship
highlights: Built a LeanIX report using a React application with Chart.js and TypeScript.
Worked on data visualization, report structure, and implementation details for internal reporting needs.
Delivered a working reporting solution in a new topic area for the team.

projects.title: Internal Web Application with Admin Interface
projects.description: A web application for managing application-related information for employees.
projects.role: Frontend / web application developer during my IMS internship
highlights: Contributed to the further development of a web application including an admin interface.
Worked on requirement gathering with stakeholders and implemented features in the frontend and application logic.
Helped improve an internal tool used to manage application information with structured development workflows including peer reviews.

projects.title: Mystery Vision Website Optimization
projects.description: Optimization and further development of a company website built on Shopify.
projects.role: Frontend developer during a practical assignment
highlights: Improved and extended the website, including smaller bug fixes and optimization proposals.
Identified and documented security issues and analyzed structure, usability, and performance.
Combined design preparation in Figma with technical implementation in Shopify.

experience.title: IMS Praktikant / Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Developed a LeanIX report with React, Chart.js, and TypeScript.
Contributed to the further development of a web application including an admin interface.
Implemented solutions using React, TypeScript, Next.js, Redux, and Microsoft SQL Server.
Worked with Git and GitHub including peer reviews.
highlights: Built internal reporting UI with React and TypeScript.
Worked on an admin interface for managing application information.
Collaborated with stakeholders to clarify and implement requirements.
Adapted quickly to a new domain and delivered strong results in a topic that was new to the team.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Implemented changes in Shopify, fixed smaller bugs, and documented optimization ideas.
highlights: Quickly learned the existing systems and worked independently.
Delivered structured, careful, and solution-oriented work.
Contributed improvement ideas for workflows and product quality.
Exceeded expectations during the practical assignment according to the certificate.

education.degree: IMS background with application development related training

availability: Open to junior frontend or frontend/fullstack roles. Switzerland preferred. Remote or hybrid is also fine. For exact availability, please contact directly.
strengths: Fast learning and quick understanding of new systems
Able to work independently and also collaborate well with stakeholders and teams

chatPreferences.languagePolicy: Respond in the same language as the visitor.
neverMention: Anything not in the provided profile or projects
Invented metrics, clients, team sizes, or business impact
Personal or private details from certificates
Exact legal or administrative background unless directly relevant
answerStyle: Do not invent numbers or business impact
If a detail is missing, say not publicly listed or available on request
Keep answers short first, then expand if the visitor asks follow-up questions
Prefer concrete technologies and responsibilities over generic claims
